ava started the day with 50 pencils. at recess, she gave 4 pencils to her classmate emma. later, she lost 2 pencils while walking home from school. in the evening, ava's dad bought her a new pencil case with 15 pencils. emma came over and gave ava three times as many pencils as she received at recess. ask how many pencils did ava end the day with

ava ended the day with 50 pencils minus 4 pencils given to emma minus 2 pencils lost while walking home plus 15 pencils bought from her dad plus 12 pencils given by emma. is there anything else i can help with?
